hero.title: Welcome to Chronos Portal
hero.subtitle: A modern modular application platform
hero.paragraph: Build scalable applications with our federated module architecture. Get started quickly with pre-built modules and customize to your needs.

carousel.title: Enterprise Scheduling, Reimagined
carousel.content: Whether you're managing hundreds or thousands of employees across multiple departments, our platform brings every schedule, preference, and workforce decision together in one intelligent system.

carousel.title: Let Your Team Be Heard. Let AI Handle the Rest.
carousel.content: Stop spending hours balancing employee preferences, coverage requirements, and operational needs. Employees tell us what works for them—we automatically create schedules that keep both your people and your business running smoothly.

carousel.title: Natural Language In. Optimized Schedules Out.
carousel.content: Your workforce shouldn't have to learn another complex system. With AI-powered scheduling, employees simply communicate their availability the same way they would to a manager, and our platform takes care of the rest.

privatePreviewNotice.title: Private Preview
privatePreviewNotice.paragraph: This application is currently in private preview. Features and functionality may change as we continue development. Thank you for your feedback and participation!
